Name: Tone Map
Description: Covers parameters relating to the scene tonemapper.

Fields.Name: Exposure
Fields.Description: Controls overall scene brightness before tone mapping is applied, simulating camera exposure.

Fields.Name: Tone Map Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the tone mapping algorithm used to convert HDR values into displayable color range.

Fields.Name: Contrast
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall image contrast after tone mapping.

Fields.Name: Reinhard Contrast
Fields.Description: Controls contrast shaping specifically for the Reinhard tone mapping operator.

Fields.Name: Reinhard White Balance
Fields.Description: Defines the white point used in Reinhard tone mapping to control highlight compression.

Fields.Name: Enable Auto Exposure
Fields.Description: Enables automatic exposure adjustment based on scene brightness over time.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Light Adaptation Speed
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly exposure adapts to brightening scenes.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Dark Adaptation Speed
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly exposure adapts to darker scenes.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Middle Gray
Fields.Description: Defines the reference luminance level considered neutral gray for exposure calculation.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Center Weight
Fields.Description: Weights exposure calculation toward the center of the screen.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Adaption Maximum
Fields.Description: Upper limit for auto exposure adjustment to prevent overexposure.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Adaption Minimum
Fields.Description: Lower limit for auto exposure adjustment to prevent underexposure.

Fields.Name: Freeze Adaptation Fade
Fields.Description: Controls whether exposure adaptation transitions smoothly when frozen or locked.

Fields.Name: Enable Chromatic Aberration
Fields.Description: Enables lens-based color separation at image edges for a stylized optical effect.

Fields.Name: Tone Lateral Dispersion: 0
Fields.Description: Controls the first channel offset used in chromatic lateral dispersion.

Fields.Name: Tone Lateral Dispersion: 1
Fields.Description: Controls the second channel offset used in chromatic lateral dispersion.

Fields.Name: Vignetting Power
Fields.Description: Controls the strength of darkening toward the screen edges.

Fields.Name: Vignetting Range
Fields.Description: Defines how far from the center vignetting begins to affect the image.

Fields.Name: Vignetting Shape
Fields.Description: Controls the falloff shape of the vignette effect (circular, elliptical, etc.).

Fields.Name: Vignetting FOV Dependence
Fields.Description: Adjusts vignette strength based on camera field of view.

Fields.Name: Color Grading: Hue
Fields.Description: Shifts the overall hue of the final image color grading.

Fields.Name: Color Grading: Saturation
Fields.Description: Adjusts the intensity of colors in the final graded image.

Fields.Name: Color Grading: Shift
Fields.Description: Offsets color channels to achieve stylized grading or tinting effects.

Fields.Name: Color Grading: Scale
Fields.Description: Scales individual color channels for fine-tuned color grading control.

Fields.Name: Color Grading: Value
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall brightness/value component of the color grading process.

Fields.Name: Final Contrast
Fields.Description: Final contrast adjustment applied after tone mapping and color grading.
